name: player
level: amateur doubles, around 2.x moving toward level 3
current_problems: Can stand still before opponent hits
Watches the shuttle after hitting and delays recovery
Rear-court clear often reaches only opponent mid-court
Rear-court contact point may be low or behind the body
Net shots are unstable: sometimes into the net, sometimes too high
Smash is not fast or heavy, but it is not the first priority
Doubles positioning needs improvement: attacking front/back, defending side/side, avoiding crowding partner
Weak post-shot connection, often one-shot only
